_instructions: REAL-RECORD VALIDATION CASE (level-2), COMPLETED. TOKI/GYO project disclosure 'Projede Benzer Nitelikte Olan Bagimsiz Bolumlerin Ortalama Satis Fiyatlari (31 Aralik 2019 tarihi itibariyle)' for Park Mavera III (PMVR3), manually audited by the operator. METHODOLOGICAL CORE: the disclosure reports TWO DISTINCT aggregate populations - OFFERED inventory (84 units) and CUMULATIVE REALIZED sales (387 units). These are NOT the same units, so they are NOT a paired reference->realized observation: NO synthetic pair and NO closing discount between 1,172,785.71 and 997,375.19 is computed. This record is therefore NOT a RealizedLabel; it is represented as TWO unpaired aggregate observations (observation_model=aggregate_observation) that lack realized_price/reference_price by construction and are EXCLUDED from asking_to_closing_labels(). The adapter normalizes the operator-extracted structured table fields (no raw PDF parsing). Room-type strata (2+1 / 3+1 / 4+1 / 5+1) ARE included per population, manually audited from the SAME official disclosure; each stratum carries count / total_price / total_gross_m2 / average_price / average_m2_price, and the strata counts and totals sum EXACTLY to the cohort aggregates (84 -> 98,514,000.00; 387 -> 385,984,197.52), which therefore remain unchanged.

manifest.notes: Park Mavera III (PMVR3) as of 2019-12-31. UNPAIRED aggregates: offered_inventory count=84 total=98,514,000.00 avg=1,172,785.71; cumulative_realized_sales count=387 total=385,984,197.52 avg=997,375.19. NOT paired -> no reference->realized, no closing discount. Represented as two aggregate observations; excluded from asking_to_closing_labels(). Per-room-type strata (2+1/3+1/4+1/5+1) are populated and audited; strata counts/totals reconcile EXACTLY to the cohort aggregates (unchanged). parser_version here pins the AGGREGATE parser (1.0.0), independent of the paired PARSER_VERSION.

parser_input.disclosure_title: Projede Benzer Nitelikte Olan Bağımsız Bölümlerin Ortalama Satış Fiyatları (31 Aralık 2019 tarihi itibariyle)
